programme.title: Paul Merton: Driving Amazing Trains
programme.desc: In Wales, Paul rides an ultra-modern signal-free line, helps to service a slate-hauling steam train in the birthplace of Thomas the Tank Engine, and experiences the quirky beauty of Portmeirion.

programme.title: Sarah Beenys New Country Lives
programme.desc: Gary and Annette plan their dream country home, while Dannie and Grace research activities for another new learning zone on their family farm.

programme.title: Escape to Florida
programme.desc: Dance teacher Sarah juggles St Patricks Day and her wedding celebration. Kay readies her soccer club for kick-off. Donna and Dan surprise son Oliver in the famous Don CeSar hotel.

programme.title: Sun, Sea and Selling Houses
programme.desc: In Alicante, the Rodriguezes help Lorraine and Andy embrace a slower pace of life. On the Costa Blanca, can the Aldertons bring Sauls long search for the perfect place to an end?

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: A property in the sun has been a lifelong dream for Lynne and her husband Frankie, who has a terminal illness. Can Ben Hillman find their perfect home on the Costa Teguise in Lanzarote?

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Kath and Charlotte from east London cant wait to escape their busy city lives by buying a Spanish holiday home around the Sierra Nevada. Danni Menzies shows them five amazing options.

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Allie and Cliff have decided to leave the UK and find their new forever home on the beautiful Greek island of Crete. Ben Hillman has been challenged to find the best properties around for their £240,000 budget.

programme.title: Chateau DIY
programme.desc: Tim and Sharon are buzzing to welcome guests, but theres an unfinished suite and wasps in the chimney. Will a shocking disappearance derail Alicia and Carltons big moment?

programme.title: Kirstie and Phils Love It or List It: Brilliant Builds
programme.desc: Kirstie and Phil look back at Andy and Jess Tucks grand renovation of their cramped three-bed semi in Long Eaton. Did they manage it on a shoestring budget?

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: The competition comes from Kent, where the first to host is 51-year-old construction site manager and part-time bouncer Mark. Mark is hosting a cheesy fun-fuelled evening, hoping that his dinner party is as much about the party as it is the dinner.

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: On the second night in Kent, competitive sales assistant Verush is going all out to win by hosting a Czech-themed evening, but how will her traditional food go down with the guests?

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Its night three in Kent, and doggy lover Karen hopes to scoop the £1000 prize with a British bulldog bonanza, with every course inspired by her dogs.

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Its the fourth day of the competition in Kent, and musician Amrick, whos been keeping his musical talents a secret from his guests, is revealing all.

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Its the final night of the competition in Kent where photographer Anthony plans to wow his guests with an evening of fine food and culinary excellence.

programme.title: Perfect Pub Walks with Alexander Armstrong
programme.desc: Alexander Armstrong takes famous faces on some spectacular pub walks, starting with a majestic meander through Yorkshire with James May.

programme.title: Cruising to the Ends of the Earth
programme.desc: As the sparkling Diamond Princess glides into South Korea, guests enjoy the colourful Gamcheon Culture Village, and Alaskan cruisers witness the Mendenhall Glacier in all its beauty.

programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE
programme.desc: A patient with an ankle injury recalls how meeting her husband saved her life. Meanwhile, 84-year-old Ioannis is treated for dizziness as his kids speak warmly of a brave, loving father.

programme.title: Super Surgeons: A Chance at Life
programme.desc: Peter has a fast-growing tumour and needs throat reconstruction to save his life. Janets pancreatic cancer is wrapped around a vital vein - can the growth be removed?

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: Britains sharpest armchair critics share more of their sharp, insightful, passionate and sometimes emotional critiques of the weeks biggest and best shows on television.

programme.title: 8 Out of 10 Cats Does Countdown
programme.desc: Joe Wilkinson and Alex Brooker take on Kevin Bridges and Judi Love. Brian Butterfield (Peter Serafinowicz) joins Susie Dent in Dictionary Corner, while maths whizz Rachel Riley looks after the numbers.

programme.title: Taskmaster
programme.desc: Armando Iannucci causes outrage with an ostrich. Joanna Page and Alex Horne have an intimate conversation about guinea pigs. Joel Dommett enjoys hours of fun with pots and pans.

programme.title: First Dates
programme.desc: Its a family affair as Freds parents come for lunch and electrician Jordan brings his mum for a double date. And Ukrainian single mum Kateryna meets warm-hearted Peter.

programme.title: Police Interceptors
programme.desc: The interceptors catch a gang of car thieves red-handed. Elsewhere, officers clamp down on car crime at Essexs biggest shopping centre and help get the M25 moving after an accident.

programme.title: Police Interceptors
programme.desc: The Interceptors are outnumbered and outmuscled when they stop a coach load of cage fighters following an anonymous tip that there are drugs on board, and Kev and Andy pull over a Peugeot but the occupants are in no mood to hang around.

programme.title: Police Interceptors
programme.desc: PC Damo Stevens takes on an aggressive arsonist intent on bringing Darlington to a standstill, dog handler Andy Hunt is called to a violent domestic disturbance, and Sergeant Kev Salter is hot on the heels of a runaway quad bike.

programme.title: Tom Horn
programme.desc: A gunman and former cavalry scout is hired by a Wyoming cattle rancher to drive off rustlers, but his outdated and unorthodox methods succeed only in incurring the wrath of the locals - and result in a fateful encounter.

programme.title: The Scalphunters
programme.desc: When a man returns to civilisation after a year of fur trapping in the Rocky Mountains, hes stopped by some fearsome Kiowa Indians and compelled to trade his valuable pelts for a runaway slave. However, the worse is yet to come, as he and his unwilling new partner run into a vicious band of scalphunters.

programme.title: Trucking Heavy: Massive Moves
programme.desc: A near height-limit vessel load, a 72ft narrow boat move, and a $7 yacht now worth £400k - the teams tackle tight turns, low bridges, and high-stakes hauls to deliver precious cargo. (S1 Ep5)

programme.title: Winter Road Rescue
programme.desc: Following the snowplough crews who keep Britains roads moving when a big freeze strikes.

programme.title: Winter Road Rescue
programme.desc: Snowplough drivers and patrols are prepared to work all day and all night to keep UK roadways clear from obstruction when winter sweeps the nation. Fearless in the face of a cold front, these men and women are there to assist when disaster strikes.

programme.title: Police Interceptors
programme.desc: A massive manhunt ensues after three suspects flee onto a farm, the team raids a drugs den and officers stumble across a suspicious-looking postman.

programme.title: Police Interceptors
programme.desc: Biggers and Andy track down a suspected drug runner on the M25, Emily and Grant join forces with Ofcom to raid an illegal pirate radio station and the new Evo 10 goes down a storm with thousands of boy racers.

programme.title: The Motorway Cops: Catching Britains Speeders
programme.desc: The PCs are on the tail of an uninsured vehicle. When they finally catch up and question the suspect, they discover the driver has never taken a driving test.

programme.title: Mercury Rising
programme.desc: Centring on the relationship between an FBI agent and the boy in his care. When an autistic child cracks a secret code, the agent is drafted in to protect him from evil government forces, who view killing the boy as an easier option than changing the code. Between dodging bullets and amassing cuts and bruises, a poignant bond develops between the two.

programme.title: Trucking Hell

programme.title: Trucking Hell

programme.title: Trucking Hell

programme.title: Trucking Heavy: Massive Moves

programme.title: Trucking Heavy: Massive Moves
programme.desc: The crew collect an unusual load at Teeside airport - a decommissioned passenger jet destined for Durham, but the journey and the unload could prove problematic. (S1 Ep2)

programme.title: Trucking Heavy: Massive Moves

programme.title: The Motorway Cops: Catching Britains Speeders
programme.desc: We are back on the roads with Cheshire Polices elite team of motorway cops. Storms bring travel chaos to the roads and PC Mike responds to a call for urgent backup on the night shift.

programme.title: The Motorway Cops: Catching Britains Speeders
programme.desc: With three million dashcams now in vehicles, a look at some of Britains worst driving offenders.

programme.title: The Far Country
programme.desc: Classic tale in which a cowboys dreams of peace and prosperity in the Canadian gold towns are unexpectedly shattered by a corrupt sheriff. The unscrupulous lawman steals the cowboys valuable herd of cattle and kills his close friend, leaving him with no option but to fight back.

programme.title: The X-Files
programme.desc: Mulder must find a way to capture an alien bounty hunter who has been murdering doctors and has kidnapped Scully.

programme.title: The X-Files
programme.desc: When animals from a zoo in Fairfield, Idaho, disappear from their cages, reappearing miles away, and a local man is killed by an invisible force, Mulder and Scully investigate. They become caught in a conflict between an animal rights activist and a zoo director, and Scully is forced to conduct the strangest autopsy of her career.

programme.title: The X-Files
programme.desc: Mulder and Scully investigate the rusting hulk of a new naval destroyer whose crew died of premature ageing. They are reminded of the Philadelphia Experiment, which took place during the Second World War where the US government attempted to make battleships invisible to radar, but stranded on the ghost ship, they also fall prey to a wrinkle in time.

programme.title: The X-Files
programme.desc: Mulder and Scully travel to Gibsonton, Florida, a town built and populated by circus and sideshow performers, to investigate the death of Jerald Glazebrook, the Alligator Man. While searching for leads on the killer, the agents come across many bizarre characters including the local sheriff who was once known as Jim, the Dog-Faced Boy.

programme.desc: Monica decides to hold a surprise birthday for Rachel, but everything goes wrong when Rachels estranged parents turn up unexpectedly. The party then splits into two factions: a dreary gathering in Monicas apartment, and a college-style drunken party at Chandler and Joeys flat.

programme.title: Filthy Britain SOS
programme.desc: Alan and Emma battle their way around one of Huntingdons most notoriously filthy estates. Meanwhile, on the banks of the River Thames, volunteers are counting just how many non-degradable wet wipes are ending up on the rivers banks.

programme.title: Vanessa
programme.desc: Raw, unfiltered, authentic and personal, Vanessa wants you to tell her whats on your mind. Fiery discussions, a good giggle and plenty of afternoon gossip!

programme.title: Police Interceptors
programme.desc: Tonights high octane episode kick starts with the pursuit of a lights out and dangerous teenage car thief, whos rallying around the roads of Wakefield at ninety miles an hour.

programme.title: Police Interceptors
programme.desc: Interceptor Nick Priestley gets all misty eyed after a high-speed pursuit of an unusual get away car from a bygone era, namely a Rover 75. Meanwhile, Tom Whitehouse and David Robson are on a stakeout.

programme.title: Rogue Claimers
programme.desc: Fraudsters put innocent drivers lives at risk by engineering crashes on public roads, while a stag do in Ibiza provides the backdrop to an audacious scam for a lost watch.

programme.title: Home and Away
programme.desc: Feeling awful, John hopes to clear the air with Justin and Leah after the garage debacle, but Marilyn tells him hes the last person they want to see.

programme.title: Home and Away
programme.desc: Abigail has suggested that Lacey pursue another news article, hoping theres a way to put all this publicity toward something good.

programme.title: GPs: Behind Closed Doors
programme.desc: The staff face a flurry of bowel problems, including coeliac disease, cancer and a complete pelvic repair.

programme.title: Casualty 24/7: Every Second Counts
programme.desc: Four-year-old Skyler is rushed into Paediatrics care with recurring seizures; 65-year-old Shaun has tumbled down some steps; and Eric, 85, has a badly swollen leg.

programme.title: 999 Critical Condition
programme.desc: A man is rushed in with some of the worst facial injuries the team have ever seen, a woman is badly injured in a road accident, and a patient arrives after a serious fall in a care home.

programme.title: AandE After Dark
programme.desc: An angry patient with a police escort gives Dr Pons treatment plan short shrift.

programme.title: Surgeons: A Matter of Life or Death
programme.desc: This ground-breaking new series tells the stories of remarkable life-saving operations at one of Britains biggest hospitals, filmed close up with extraordinary stories of surgical skill.

programme.title: Skin AandE
programme.desc: Professional bass player Caleb has a lump on his forehead that he wants Dr Dev to remove as its giving him a headache. Its gunk galore as Dr Emma operates on a chest cyst, while Dr Adil debates whether he can remove a large keloid.

programme.title: Accused: Guilty or Innocent?
programme.sub-title: Violent Gunman or Brain Trauma Victim?
programme.desc: A man wakes up handcuffed in hospital, half-blind from a gunshot. He is accused of attacking his fiancee and neighbour. He struggles to remember the details of that fateful night. Was this violence or brain trauma?

programme.title: GPs: Behind Closed Doors
programme.desc: The doctors treat a wave of patients in search of physical and emotional pain relief, including a man with a painful toe who has performed his own self-diagnosis, and a woman who is in a low mood after donating her kidney to her sister.

programme.title: My Cat From Hell
programme.desc: Feline glutton Gus is an unhealthy eater, and a breast cancer survivor tries to move on with her life, but her vicious cat scares off potential suitors.

programme.title: Lone Star Law
programme.desc: A badly injured tortoise needs an innovative procedure and an eagles death is investigated. As night falls, a car crash turns into a manhunt.

programme.title: Dr. Jeff: Rocky Mountain Vet

programme.title: Treehouse Masters
programme.desc: An Irish family has the perfect tree to nestle a Celtic-themed cottage. Pete devises a design that includes a rainmaker to mimic the wet Ireland climate.

programme.title: Alaska: Surviving the Last Frontier

programme.title: Alaska Monsters
programme.desc: The Alaska Midnight Sons head near Denali National Park to investigate one of the tallest and most aggressive Bigfoots they have ever encountered.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue
programme.desc: The Raneys must save an Oregon homestead trapped at the bottom of a 100 foot cliff separating them from four acres of land they need for food and livestock.

programme.title: Speed of Life
programme.desc: Super slow motion cameras capture the astonishing agility of a caracal as it plucks a bird from the air and the lightning 50/1000th of a second strike of a praying mantis.

programme.title: Treehouse Masters
programme.desc: Pete joins renowned builders Christopher Richter and Andreas Wenning on an adventure in Germany.

programme.title: Animal Cops: Houston

programme.sub-title: Big Boi Ruins Our Social Life
programme.desc: An expectant mother battles to keep a persistent feline out of her workspace and a territorial cat puts a damper on his owners love lives. Can Jackson help?

programme.sub-title: Shaq Takes It to the Trees!
programme.desc: Pete builds an all-star speakeasy for basketball legend Shaquille ONeil. He creates a decagonal structure with soaring ceilings and extra wide stairs.

programme.title: The Gamechangers: Inventing the World
programme.desc: Two teams of engineers believe that electric power is the solution to mankinds addiction to fossil fuels. Will an electric speedboat and an electric plane be a success?

programme.title: How Do Animals Do That?
programme.desc: New science and amazing demonstrations explain the bizarre, the brilliant and the most mind-blowing animal behaviours.

programme.title: How Do Animals Do That?

programme.title: Extinct or Alive
programme.desc: Wildlife biologist Forrest Galante scours the globe using cutting-edge technology on his mission to find species the world has stopped looking for from the Florida Everglades to remote jungles in a search for the truth.

programme.title: Alaska Gold Diggers
programme.desc: With the seasons end looming, SJ and John engage in a power struggle over mining locations when the women return to Gold Run.

programme.title: Tanked
programme.desc: A communications company is in need of an interactive aquarium shaped like a giant telephone. Can Wayne and Brett rustle up a tank that will get them talking?

programme.title: Tanked
programme.desc: In Vegas, the guys create a smoker tank for The Rolling Smoke BBQ. Plus, The Salt Life Food Shack asks the duo to bring the sea to life with a pipeline wave tank.

programme.title: Edge of Alaska
programme.desc: Extreme weather threatens the locals who must brave the frozen wilderness to hunt big game. Plus, a landowner begins to open the frontier to the outside world.

programme.title: Edge of Alaska

programme.title: The Haunted
programme.desc: A family buy a building that was rumoured to be haunted and discover a gangster was murdered there. Also, a family experience events that make them take a close look at their home.

programme.title: The Million Dollar Duck
programme.desc: Dive into the weird world of the Federal Duck Stamp Contest, where the artists competitively paint waterfowl in their obsessive quests to win the Olympics of wildlife art.

programme.title: Mithya
programme.desc: VK moves from Delhi to Mumbai with dreams of becoming a movie actor, having trod the stage for 15 years. One evening, as the dejected VK sits drinking whisky by the sea, he inadvertently witnesses a gang shootout. When he is called to the police station to identify the culprits, a local thug notices that VK bears an uncanny, and convenient, resemblance to the gang lord Rajebhai. VK is then recruited by the mafia to play Rajebhai.

programme.title: Attenboroughs Paradise Birds
programme.desc: Documentary tracing David Attenboroughs lifelong passion for birds of paradise. One of the first to film many of their beautiful and often bizarre displays, David has tracked these `birds from paradise all over the jungles of New Guinea.

programme.title: Top Gear
programme.desc: Jeremy Clarkson makes a film about the BMW X6 and ends up conducting one of the most expensive road tests in `Top Gear history. James May drives the new Vauxhall Insignia VXR, accompanied by Margaret Calvert, the designer of Britains road signs; and Richard Hammond tests the £340,000 Lexus supercar. The Star in a Reasonably Priced Car is blues musician Seasick Steve.

programme.title: Death in Paradise
programme.desc: The team are confounded when a tourist is stabbed whilst travelling down one floor, all alone, in a hotel lift. It transpires that the victim was severely ill, and coming to St Marie had been on her bucket list.

programme.title: Death Valley
programme.desc: A murder-mystery party turns into a real investigation when a famous actor is found stabbed to death. John reconnects with an old flame while he and Janie investigate.

programme.title: Death Valley
programme.desc: John and Janie unravel a mystery involving a murder at a school reunion, a cold case and a shocking discovery from Janies past. John risks their friendship with unexpected news.

programme.title: Smoggie Queens
programme.desc: The gang learn that it is Stewarts birthday, but he does not want them to make a big fuss out of it in case his grandmother or colleagues find out he is gay. The queens come up with a cunning plan.

programme.title: Smoggie Queens
programme.desc: It is Middlesbrough Pride and Mam is hosting the main stage and has booked a Girls Aloud drag tribute act. It `promises to be a banger.

programme.title: We Built a Zoo
programme.desc: During his teenage years, TikTok star Kyle Thomas built up a small menagerie of exotic animals that lived at home with him and his mother.

programme.title: Attenboroughs Paradise Birds
programme.desc: Documentary tracing David Attenboroughs lifelong passion for birds of paradise. One of the first to film many of their beautiful and often bizarre displays, David has tracked these `birds from paradise all over the jungles of New Guinea.

programme.title: Paranormal: Britains Last Witch
programme.desc: Theres an unnerving breakthrough in Sians investigation into a woman who claimed to summon spirits of the dead when she finds an audio recording of a Helen Duncan seance. Not only is a gravelly male spirit heard to speak, but the people gathered comment that they see and recognise him. How is this possible? Sian tests out different theories - was it someone else speaking?

programme.title: Doctor Who
programme.desc: A Dalek fleet surrounds a lone rebel ship, and only the Doctor can help them. As he faces his greatest enemy he needs Clara by his side. Confronted with a decision that could change the Daleks forever, he is forced to examine his conscience.

programme.title: Doctor Who
programme.desc: In a sun dappled Sherwood forest, the Doctor discovers an evil plan and strikes up an unlikely alliance with Robin Hood. With all of Nottingham at stake, the Doctor must decide who is real and who is fake. Can impossible heroes actually exist?

programme.title: Ghosts
programme.desc: While Button House is being fumigated for woodworm, Alison and Mike decide to save some money and camp in the grounds, sending the ghosts routines off kilter.

programme.title: Ghosts
programme.desc: Alison has invited Lucy to come to Button House for a sleepover, but after a worrying meeting with the solicitor, Alison must work out if Lucy is really who she says she is. The Captain insists on utilising his skills in surveillance to help Alison find out the truth. After an emailing prank by Julian gets out of hand, Mike has some awkward explaining to do to his boss, which Julian and Robin are gleeful to have front row seats for.

programme.title: Miranda
programme.desc: Miranda has spent most of her life avoiding being set up by her mother Penny. Old school pal Tilly sets her up on a blind date with an army doctor friend, Dreamboat Charlie. The date doesnt go quite to plan and so Penny insists on throwing a party to introduce Miranda to a suitable man. When Miranda sees a photo of her intended date hes so bad that the only option left is to lie and to come out to her mother.

programme.title: Miranda
programme.desc: When a handsome guy leaves his wallet in the shop, Miranda and Stevie think it could be a sign, especially when they discover hes called Robert Husband. They become highly competitive and try to find out who hed prefer to take to dinner if he had to choose one of them. Meanwhile, Tilly has invited Miranda to Henley Regatta under the strict proviso that she doesnt embarrass her.

programme.title: Knocked Up
programme.desc: When a glamorous TV journalist gets pregnant by a guy shed rather forget, her decision to keep the baby turns her life upside down.

programme.title: Two Pints of Lager and a Packet of Crisps
programme.desc: Janet takes action to stay safe for baby Corinthian. Gaz seeks a new friend who can replace Jonny and talk about wanking. Donna tries to get new bar manager Tim to come out.

programme.title: Two Pints of Lager and a Packet of Crisps
programme.desc: Pregnant Louise finds out she is carrying a girl, not a boy. When Donna fires bitchy Tim, she has to work with depressed Janet and mad Munch.

programme.title: Two Pints of Lager and a Packet of Crisps
programme.desc: Gaz works through his list of three things he must do before he dies, including being a porn star. Donna gets work in a charity shop to try to overcome her fear of death.

programme.title: Two Pints of Lager and a Packet of Crisps
programme.desc: When the bailiffs come to repossess her house, Janet has 24 hours to get some money or lose her home. Louise finds a rich criminal who seems keen to help.

programme.title: Two Pints of Lager and a Packet of Crisps
programme.desc: When Donna goes to London to get her dream job, Janet and Gaz are left alone together. Louise starts having contractions. Yes, its baby time!

programme.title: Miranda
programme.desc: Miranda has spent most of her life avoiding being set up by her mother Penny. Old school pal Tilly sets her up on a blind date with an army doctor friend, Dreamboat Charlie. The date doesnt go quite to plan and so Penny insists on throwing a party to introduce Miranda to a suitable man. When Miranda sees a photo of her intended date hes so bad that the only option left is to lie and to come out to her mother.

programme.title: This Is BBC TWO
programme.desc: Preview of upcoming programmes from BBC Two.

programme.title: Great Korean Railway Journeys
programme.desc: Leaving Seoul aboard South Koreas high-speed KTX train, Michael travels south through the heart of the country to explore how rail has shaped both its economy and identity.

programme.title: Great Korean Railway Journeys
programme.desc: Michaels journey continues in Busan, South Koreas second city, on the countrys south-eastern coast. Later, he heads to Jeonju, where he meets a master craftsman producing hanji paper.

programme.title: Just One Thing
programme.desc: Roman Kemp suggests a reverse-moves approach to exercise, including walking downhill instead of up and lowering weights instead of lifting them, both of which could have significant health benefits.

programme.title: Ronan Keatings Wild Atlantic
programme.desc: Ronan explores the dramatic coastline of the north-west of Ireland on his motorbike before jumping on stage to belt out a few songs in one of Donegals buzzing country music venues.

programme.title: See Hear
programme.desc: Features and discussions reflect on the lives of individuals with various degrees of hearing impairments. Along the way, the presenters share their perspectives on relevant matters.

programme.title: BBC News
programme.desc: Twenty-four hours a day, the latest national and international stories as they break.

programme.title: Animal Park
programme.desc: Theres a mystery arrival at the park who is changing the landscape in Wiltshire. There are tell-tale signs by the lake: felled trees, gnawed branches and changed waterways. The keepers have their suspicions about what may have caused this, so have set up hidden camera traps to try to solve the mystery. Also, the keepers test Jeans knowledge of animal poo as she finds out why knowing the difference is so important.

programme.title: Wanted Down Under
programme.desc: Beth Hood has spent all her life caring for her mum but now she feels her own family life is suffering. She believes a new start in Australia just might provide the answer, so the family spend a trial week in Perth to see if it is right for them.

programme.title: Homes Under the Hammer
programme.desc: Dion relives his footballing glory days in his native Leicestershire, Martin is floorboard obsessed in Oxford, and Jacqui is impressed by the condition of a one-bed flat in south London.

programme.title: Bargain Hunt
programme.desc: The teams are at Uttoxeter Racecourse where they hope to gallop off with bargains. Can Jonathan Pratt and Irita Marriott guide their teams across the finishing line at the auction?

programme.title: Impossible
programme.desc: Thirty players compete across the series, scoring points by answering questions correctly. However, they must avoid the impossible answers, otherwise they will be eliminated from the show until the next day.

programme.title: Money for Nothing
programme.desc: Sarah Moore is rooting around the car boots in Witley, looking for hidden gems that she can rescue and revamp. With four items saved from the skip, Sarah enlists the help of designer/maker Rupert Blanchard to give a dressing table and mirror a new use, while upholsterer Sharon OConnor is tasked with bringing a petite sofa up to date.

programme.title: Escape to the Country
programme.desc: Having lived in the same house virtually all her life, a ukelele-playing buyer has £280,000 to relocate to Wales. Briony May Williams is tasked with helping her find the perfect property, and it will need to accommodate an entourage of animals.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: The team are in Carlisle, where they unearth some 19th-century smoking pipes, a stoneware mug with a fascinating inscription, and a painting of dogs which cost its owner less than £1 but is now worth £15,000.

programme.title: Flog It!
programme.desc: Members of the public bring their antiques to be viewed and valued.

programme.title: Pointless
programme.desc: Alexander Armstrong is joined by co-host Angela Scanlon for the brainy quiz where the contestants try to score as few points as possible by plumbing the depths of their general knowledge to come up with the answers no-one else could think of.

programme.title: BBC News at Six
programme.desc: The latest national and international news, followed by weather.

programme.title: Great Korean Railway Journeys
programme.desc: On the final leg of his journey, Michael travels to South Koreas south-west, where food, protest and landscape reveal the values that have shaped the modern nation.

programme.title: Richard Osmans House of Games
programme.desc: In Richard Osmans House of Games, a new group of famous faces go head-to-head testing their general knowledge skills in a variety of fun trivia-based games.

programme.title: Gardeners World
programme.desc: Set against the dramatic backdrop of the Malvern Hills, Gardeners World comes from the spectacular RHS Malvern Spring Festival in Worcestershire.

programme.title: Beechgrove Garden
programme.desc: Planting borders and planning for cut flowers are on Lizzie Schofield and Brian Cunninghams to-do list at Beechgrove Garden.

programme.title: Have I Got News for You
programme.desc: Steph McGovern hosts, with guest panellists comedian Jon Richardson and actress Sheila Hancock joining team captains Paul Merton and Ian Hislop as they delve into the news.

programme.title: Saving Lives at Sea
programme.desc: On the north Somerset coast, the Minehead crew come close to disaster in a challenging rescue of two walkers cut off by the tide.

programme.title: Newsnight
programme.desc: Featuring extensive coverage of the days top national and international news stories, along with explanations about the context and potential aftereffects.

programme.desc: The latest weather forecast.

programme.desc: Romesh Ranganathan travels to some of the most unlikely places on earth for a holiday.

programme.desc: While travelling with top-secret documents on a B-17 Flying Fortress, a female WWII pilot encounters an evil presence on board.

programme.title: See Hear
programme.desc: Features and discussions reflect on the lives of individuals with various degrees of hearing impairments. Along the way, the presenters share their perspectives on relevant matters.

programme.title: Duck and Frog
programme.desc: Duck becomes a very serious librarian and makes it his mission to maintain the peace and quiet - that is until Frog arrives and has other ideas.

programme.title: Duck and Frog
programme.desc: When Duck and Frog have to change a lighthouses light bulb, they quickly become marooned on the island. With no food, and surrounded by water, they must try to find a way to survive.

programme.title: Odd Squad
programme.desc: The Odd Squad investigates strange events. The agents are called in to help when Ohlm and Orchid have problems working together.

programme.title: Dennis and Gnasher Unleashed!
programme.desc: Doctor Pfooflepfeffers first act as head of governors is to turn Bash Street School into a boarding school. However, the pupils devise a series of daring attempts to escape.

programme.title: Bitesize: 5-7 Year Olds
programme.desc: Learn about animal babies, eggs and big changes.

programme.title: Frozen Planet
programme.sub-title: To the Ends of the Earth
programme.desc: David Attenborough travels to the ends of the earth on an extraordinary journey across the polar regions of our planet. The Arctic and Antarctic are the greatest and least known wildernesses of all - magical ice worlds inhabited by the most bizarre and hardy creatures on earth. At the North Pole, the sun returns after six months of darkness. A pair of courting polar bears reveal a surprisingly tender side.

programme.title: Africa
programme.desc: In Africas ancient south west corner, two extraordinary deserts sit side by side. Water is in short supply, yet these deserts are somehow full of life because the creatures that live here have turned the rules of survival on their head. This film celebrates natures ingenuity, no matter how tough it gets.

programme.title: Planet Earth II
programme.desc: Remote islands offer sanctuary for some of the planets strangest and rarest creatures. The rare pygmy three-toed sloth enjoys a peaceful existence on an idyllic Caribbean island, while nesting albatross thrive in predator free isolation. However, island life always comes at a cost. On the Galapagos Islands young marine iguana must escape an onslaught of deadly racer snakes the moment they hatch from the sand.

programme.title: DIY Deadly with Steve Backshall
programme.desc: Wildlife expert Steve Backshall turns detective to solve viewers animal mysteries.

programme.title: Gym Stars
programme.desc: The sport of gymnastics is incredibly popular, and there are over a million people on the waiting list to join a gymnastics class. A look behind the scenes of the lives of some of the UKs most promising young gymnasts.

programme.title: The Football Academy
programme.desc: Follow U13s trialist Kojo, who has eight weeks to impress the club and hopefully get signed. Plus, meet U12s best friends forever, Finn, Sidney, and Teddy.

programme.title: Octonauts: Above and Beyond
programme.sub-title: The Octonauts and the Flying Foxes
programme.desc: Rising waters in Brazil lead Tweak and Dashi to help fire ants build a bridge above a river; the Octonauts help fruit bats beat the Australian heat.

programme.desc: After a spate of unfortunate accidents, Pancake becomes convinced that rubbing a lucky icicle will bring him good luck - but panics when its rubbed away, until his friends step in.

programme.desc: Ozzie and Orli must stop the villainous Knights of the Square Table from turning things to stone; Ozzie and Orli time travel to save Odd Squad.

programme.title: Grizzy and The Lemmings
programme.desc: The Lemmings disguise themselves as traditional Chinese dancers in order to trick Grizzy and steal the TV.

programme.title: Blue Peter
programme.desc: Packed full of amazing celeb guests, epic challenges and lols galore!

programme.title: One Zoo Three
programme.desc: Cam, Tyler and Aaron look after the zoos marvellous mums and mums-to-be. While there are questions over whether Laila the snow leopard is expecting a cub, the capybaras have three adorable surprises.

programme.title: Africa
programme.desc: East Africa is a land which is constantly changing. To survive here, creatures must be able to deal with unpredictable twists and turns - wet turning to dry, feast to famine, cold to hot - no matter how hostile it becomes. From dense forests to snow capped peaks, steamy swamps and endless savannah, this unique and varied land is also a haven for life, supporting large animals in numbers found nowhere else on Earth.

programme.title: Blue Peter
programme.sub-title: Challenges: Can Shini and Abby survive a night in a haunted house?
programme.desc: Childrens magazine with things to make, celebrity guests, music, sport, food and a lot more. You can earn a Blue Peter badge by getting creative and entering competitions.

programme.title: This is CBBC!
programme.desc: Join the CBBC crew for all your favourite programmes. Tune into CBBC every day from 7.00am.

programme.desc: Join the CBBC crew for all your favourite programmes. Tune into CBBC every day from 7.00am.

programme.title: This Is CBeebies
programme.desc: Welcome to the CBeebies channel. Programmes start at 6.00am.

programme.title: Roots and Fruits
programme.desc: Live from the Roots and Fruits theatre, its Coconut getting his moment in the limelight with his sea shanty Oh, the Big Waves, if he manages to overcome a little stage fright.

programme.title: Bing
programme.desc: Bing is at Ammas creche and it is his turn to choose the game, Musical Statues. Flop gets the Bingpad going and soon all the children are dancing like crazy. Sula goes out first, quickly followed by Coco who both watch for wobblers with Amma. In the final round, Bing wobbles at the last moment and Pando wins much to Bings distress - he chose the game so he thought he should win it. Fortunately, Charlie never stopped dancing.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: Tinky Winky, Dipsy, Laa-­-Laa and Po drive to the Hidey Hup in the Tubby Car. They enjoy going on the Tubby Bouncy, the Tubby Uppy Downy, the Tubby Spinny and the Tubby Slidey.

programme.title: Tee and Mo
programme.desc: Mo can make Tee crack-up laughing with one tickle, but Tee is unable to get her to laugh in return. Tee gets more and more frustrated as he tries to find Mos tickle spot.

programme.title: Supertato
programme.desc: Supertato and Tomato find themselves stuck in a slippery bathtub, whilst Evil Pea rampages around the supermarket on a giant soap-squirting machine.

programme.title: Bing
programme.desc: Bing is waiting to sit in the fire engine at the park. Pando and Sula both get a turn, but when it is Bings go there is an emergency and the fire engine has to leave.

programme.title: Mojo Swoptops
programme.desc: Felix the pig is stuck on a cliff ledge where not even Mojos tops can reach him. Theyll need to be creative to get Bo up there and save that poor pig!

programme.title: Hey Duggee
programme.desc: The Squirrels plant some mysterious seeds and befriend a kind, playful plant.

programme.title: Hey Duggee
programme.desc: The Squirrels are out doing their exercises when, suddenly, a cheetah called Chipo comes along with his dance crew. He criticises them for not being able to dance in time, and it turns out Duggee used to be part of the dance crew. Duggee was a great dancer, but he never stuck to the choreography and was always making up his own moves. But the Squirrels dont know what choreography is. The Rock Slippy Crew show off some impressive moves but keep criticising Duggees moves.

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: Mum wont let Bingo have pavlova, so the kids find a way by playing a cheeky game of Cafe in the kitchen. But Dad the chef sets up a competing shop that only serves edamame beans.

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: Mum reminisces about Bluey and Judo as babies. Bluey learnt to roll over first, but Judo was the first to crawl, so then it became a race to see who was going to walk first.

programme.title: Go Jetters
programme.desc: Glitch blocks Niagara Falls to give Grim HQ a mud bath. Can the Go Jetters fix the glitch?

programme.title: Peter Rabbit
programme.sub-title: The Tale of the Secret Treehouse
programme.desc: Peter proves hes got what it takes to be part of the squirrel tribe when he competes for his own treetop hideout.

programme.title: Octonauts
programme.desc: When important objects go missing from their ship, the Octonauts stake out the thief who turns out to be a decorator crab, stealing their things to decorate his shell.

programme.title: Numberblocks
programme.desc: Welcome to the fabulous, fun fruit factory, where Threes super fruit-sorting machines arent giving her any fruit. Find out how to split numbers into smaller numbers with the Numberblocks.

programme.title: Alphablocks
programme.desc: CH and SH go head-to-head in the Alphablocks Games and pit a ship and a shop against a chip and a chop.

programme.title: Nick Copes Popcast
programme.desc: After a successful trip to the dentist, Nick tells Norman all about the tooth fairy. Along with the help of the Popcasters, they write a song about looking after your teeth.

programme.title: My Petsaurus
programme.desc: A game of snakes and ladders is anything but simple for Chloe and Megan when Fluffy is on the prowl.

programme.title: Playtime Towers
programme.desc: Bella and Lift have fun playing with their favourite red bouncy ball. It bounces into the Ice Disco, where it gives Hettie the Yeti an idea for a bouncy dance!

programme.title: Bing
programme.desc: Bing and Pando experiment with Bings toy train on the Fun Fort in the playground. The train is good at going over bridges and brilliant at going down the slide. But when Bing slides it off the roof of the playhouse, the train crashes and breaks. Bing is upset until he realises that the pieces fit together to make something completely different.

programme.title: Yakka Dee
programme.desc: Dee encourages a friend to say elf, and we go on a whirlwind word adventure. Today, we meet lots of little elves. We see pointy ears and hats and stripy tights.

programme.title: Lu and the Bally Bunch
programme.desc: The children collect leaves and twigs in the forest for a collage; Lu finds a golden leaf and believes it is the only golden leaf in the forest; when Barnaby also finds a gold one, she thinks he stole hers instead.

programme.title: Piggy Builders
programme.desc: Cesar has a great idea, but maybe he is aiming too high.

programme.title: Twirlywoos
programme.desc: The Twirlywoos see a man stepping over puddles and try to copy him. Back in the Boat, Peekaboo has to jump over a wall to avoid being discovered by the Twirlywoos.

programme.title: Something Special
programme.desc: Justin and his friends host a summer party and pick vegetables to make a delicious salad. Mr Tumbles also hosting a party, but he struggles to find a garden game that hes good at.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies take turns to go up and down on the Dup Dup. Sometimes they go fast and sometimes they go slow - and even the Noo-noo has a go.

programme.title: The Baby Club
programme.desc: Giovanna and Baby Bear welcome babies DJ, Holly, Li-Li, Luke, George, Otis and their grown-ups. Inside everyones bags are bowls which are explored through discovery, play, song and story. Grown-ups at home are encouraged to take part by hiding baby appropriate bowls inside a fabric bag or pillowcase for them to reveal and explore with their baby.

programme.title: Tiny Tunes
programme.desc: In Tall Trees Forest, Lisa and the children have bubbly fun washing toy clothes, learning British Sign Language signs for jungle, clothes and washing, before singing and signing Down in the Jungle.

programme.title: I Can Grow It
programme.desc: Aaron is joined by Jackson and Mia as they discover how to feed the garden, and the special role wiggly worms have in making sure the plants stay happy and healthy.

programme.title: Monster Makes
programme.desc: Murphi is so good at hiding that Rebecca decides to make a cardboard tube tracker dog. The Recycling Express brings a shoebox, which becomes home to a magnificent monster.

programme.title: Vegesaurs
programme.desc: Ginger the Tricarrotops explores the world of the crunchiest era, going on adventures throughout the colourful Vegesaur Valley.

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: When Bingo finds a walking leaf insect in the garden while playing a game with Bluey and dad, she gets upset when dad is too caught up in the game to notice.

programme.title: Hey Duggee
programme.desc: The Squirrels have just got some new walkie-talkies and are having so much fun with them. Duggee calls the Squirrels to come for some blueberry juice, but as Tag is running, he trips over a car and falls through a secret door in the wall. Communicating through his walkie-talkie, Tag doesnt know where he is. He can see lots and lots of things around him, but no-one has any idea where this room is in the house.

programme.title: Hey Duggee
programme.desc: Duggee runs the Squirrel Club, where children can earn badges for learning new skills.

programme.title: Lets Go for a Walk
programme.sub-title: Big Rock and Spider Tree Walk
programme.desc: Ranger Hamza and the Ramblers walk through a forest to the beach in order to draw pictures in the sand. On the way, they find a big rock, copy a pigeon having a drink, make patterns in the water and even spot a tree that looks like a spider.

programme.title: Our Family
programme.desc: Ted and his family head to the beach, and Ted tries his hand at making a sandcastle. When it doesnt go quite to plan, Dad shows him some top tips.

programme.title: My World Kitchen
programme.desc: Izaac is making a traditional recipe from his home county of Lancashire. The Chorley cakes are made from circles of pastry filled with a fruity filling of dried cherries and currants. Izaac works hard tickling the flour and butter together before turning it into dough, which he then has to carefully roll out. When Izaacs friends arrive he gives them a red rose, the symbol of Lancashire. Will Izaacs friends guess the special ingredient and will they enjoy it in his Chorley cakes?

programme.title: Do You Know?
programme.desc: Maddie is outdoors, finding out about things that use the wind. She finds out how a kite works when it flies high in the sky and uses a special device to measure the wind speed.

programme.title: Dog Squad
programme.desc: Tinks is a disability assistance dog for her owner Charli, who has a condition that makes it painful for her to pick things up or to push and pull things. Tinks uses her super fetch skills to help Charli every day. The smallest of the Dog Squad gang, Tinks is a little Lhasa apso with lots of big dog energy. Charli is meeting her friend Annabel for lunch at the local cafe. They havent been out for a lunch treat for ages, and the cafes speciality is Tinkss favourite - chicken.

programme.title: Aneeshwar and Lizzie Go Wild
programme.desc: Aneeshwar and Lizzie head to a safari park to meet a herd of zebras. Next, Aneeshwar and Lizzie encounter some red-bellied piranhas. Finally, Aneeshwar and Lizzie discover what the wild connection is between these two incredible animals.

programme.title: Waffle the Wonder Dog
programme.desc: Connie and Ruby move into Maple Close with their dog, Jelly. Mrs Hobbs cant help but express her disapproval. She hates dogs and now therell be another one living in close proximity. Waffle is not allowed to go on a family camping trip but accidentally goes on a different adventure!

programme.title: Puffin Rock
programme.desc: Baba finds a beautiful shell in Bernies grotto. Oona realizes that Baba has taken the shell without Bernies permission. They need to return it and apologise.

programme.title: Small Potatoes
programme.desc: Meet potatoes from around the world as they celebrate the similarities and differences we all share, with a zydeco tune.

programme.title: Yukee
programme.desc: A famous soul singer is coming to perform in the garden, but no one knows what they look like. Meanwhile, a cheeky little mouse with a great big voice has appeared in the sun house.

programme.title: Maddie and Triggs
programme.desc: Maddie and Triggs help Mum babysit their delightfully cute, little neighbour Sally.

programme.title: Hey Duggee
programme.desc: Duggee is a big, friendly dog who runs The Squirrel Club, an after-school activity club where children can learn and take part in all kinds of activities, have fun adventures, and earn badges for their achievements.

programme.title: Numberblocks
programme.desc: One discovers its tricky to play tennis alone, but then bumps into a magic mirror and meets another One. They join forces to make Two.

programme.title: Alphablocks
programme.desc: A star leads Alphablock S and her friends on a magical journey through the night sky.

programme.title: Something Special
programme.desc: Justin and his friends go up, up, up and away having fun playing aeroplanes. Meanwhile, Mr Tumble turns his home into a hotel and has some very important guests flying in.

programme.title: Teletubbies
programme.desc: The Teletubbies go `this way, that way on a Tubby Car journey to the Hidey Hup. The Tubby Spinny goes `this way, that way too.

programme.title: Ranger Hamzas Eco Quest
programme.desc: Ranger Hamza and the Ramblers discover how sand dunes play an important role in the environment. They find out how sand dunes are made and that they can be great places for lots of plants to grow and creatures to live.

programme.title: Football Fantastics
programme.desc: Sophie must infiltrate the sports hall without disturbing a relaxation class Val is running to retrieve bibs, goals and a big bag of footballs.

programme.title: Graces Amazing Machines
programme.desc: Motorbike rider Grace shows off three amazing machines that help make roads. Grace helps operate a road planer, checks out a road printing machine and then has a go in a road paver.

programme.title: Dodges Pup School
programme.desc: Following Dodge at Pup School, a place full of mishaps and mayhem. Dodge and his pup pals turn school days into adventures with singing, silliness, and occasional squeaky toys.

programme.title: Love Monster
programme.desc: A puncture in the kiddie pool threatens to ruin Love Monsters Pool Party.

programme.title: Octonauts: Above and Beyond
programme.desc: The Octonauts find a threatened tree that must be moved - the creatures inside disagree!

programme.title: Peter Rabbit
programme.desc: When Peter realises he has accidentally upset Benjamin by asking him to sit out the next garden raid, he goes to apologise, only to find his cousin has gone.

programme.title: Hey Duggee
programme.desc: The Squirrels are struggling to build the Clubhouse out of building blocks. It keeps falling over! Duggee explains that the Squirrels need to be a bit of an Architect to create buildings that dont fall down.

programme.title: Vida the Vet
programme.desc: When her brother has a stomach bug, Pippen is afraid she will catch it because she doesnt like bugs! Vida teaches her how to feel better - and that its not a real bug.

programme.title: Supertato
programme.desc: Its a space race as Supertato helps Carrot fly her baguette rocket to become the first Veggie on the cheese moon, but halfway there Evil Pea makes them crash land.

programme.title: Weasy Family
programme.desc: Weasy, an immature and carefree weasel, suddenly becomes the adoptive parent of two ducklings he accidentally hatched.

programme.title: Mojo Swoptops
programme.desc: Its pumpkin-picking day at Jacksons farm, but something spooky has been scaring all the pumpkin pickers. Mojo and Bo need to find out whats up, and chase some ghosts!

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: Mum wont let Bingo have pavlova, so the kids find a way by playing a cheeky game of Cafe in the kitchen. But Dad the chef sets up a competing shop that only serves edamame beans.

programme.title: Piripenguins
programme.desc: The Piripenguins vow to change shopping-mad Brinicles wasteful ways. But when their clever recycling plan proves too exhausting, Looph comes up with an alternative solution.

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: Mum reminisces about Bluey and Judo as babies. Bluey learnt to roll over first, but Judo was the first to crawl, so then it became a race to see who was going to walk first.

programme.title: Balamory
programme.desc: PC Plum jumps to conclusions when he hears about an upcoming volcanic eruption. But little does he know, its Avas science project thats set to fizzle in a safe experiment.

programme.title: Waffle the Wonder Dog
programme.desc: Its the day of Jesss `bring a pet birthday party. Gramps is one of the first to arrive with Muckypups and Thor, two pugs hes dogsitting for the day, and AJ and Anaya have also brought their pets, a gecko called Leo and three fish, Dipper, Dapper and Dopper. Simon and Waffle put on a show for their excited guests, performing the amazing tricks Waffle has mastered. Next to arrive is Mr. Meagre and his talking parrot, Pickles.

programme.title: Rafi the Wishing Wizard
programme.desc: Rafis tall wish shows that growing up too fast can mean missing the joy of being little.

programme.title: JoJo and Gran Gran
programme.sub-title: Its Time for a Spring Clear Out
programme.desc: JoJo and Gran Gran are having a spring clear out, but when Gran Gran wants to clear out her old jumper, JoJo is distraught, she loves that snuggly jumper. Determined to keep it, JoJo hides the old jumper.

programme.title: Sarah and Duck
programme.desc: Sarah and her best friend Duck embark on simple but exciting adventures, exploring the world both near and far in their own wobbly and imaginative way. When Ducks chair breaks, a bus trip to a very special shop is in order.

programme.title: Clangers
programme.desc: It feels like an earthquake shakes the Clangers planet. Major and Small go out to investigate. The music trees notes have been shaken off, so Small puts them back on, before discovering what has happened to cause this - the eggbot has crashed onto the planet and is stuck in a crater. Meanwhile, Tiny discovers that the notes on the music trees are now in the wrong order. Small has an idea that if he can rescue the eggbot, the eggbot will be able to help get the notes back in the right order.

programme.title: Beddybyes
programme.desc: MeMo and BaBa discover many new ways to play on a windy day.

His journey leads him into the rural heart of India, to the village of Charanpur, and sets him on both an outward and inner quest to find where he truly belongs.

programme.desc: A young woman is parted from her lover and forced to marry an underworld don. She hopes her lover will save her, but when their families become rivals, he turns against her.

programme.title: Nastik
programme.desc: An atheist shuns his religion because his faith could not save a loved one. However, he soon starts realising hes made a mistake.

programme.title: Guest iin London
programme.desc: Aryan lives in London with his partner Anaya. Problems arise when Gangasharan and his wife Guddi, their uncle and aunt from India, land up at their house uninvited.

programme.title: Dil Bole Hadippa!
programme.desc: A feisty cricket-expert enters the mens cricket team to play in the Cricket World Cup. However, she is in a predicament when she falls for her handsome cricket coach.

programme.title: Sholay
programme.desc: The tale of one mans fight for justice. In an act of retribution, cold-blooded criminal Gabbar Singh massacres the family of a police officer, Thakur Baldev. Left crippled by his enemy, Thakur is hungry for revenge but, seeing no way of bringing Gabbar to book, he hires two petty crooks, Veeru and Jai.

programme.title: Pankh
programme.desc: Film highlighting a phenomenon peculiar and exclusive to the Indian film industry, the practise of casting children in roles opposite to their natural genders.

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Bringing the best in television.

programme.title: Chor Ke Ghar Chor
programme.desc: When an idol of Devi Maa, which brings immense luck to its owner, is found after many years, it causes a lot of mayhem between two noble families that wish to keep it for themselves.

programme.desc: The boys are back! Bradley and Barney Walsh embark on a 3,000-mile journey through Europe, starting off in the sunny south of Croatia and ending up in the ice-cold Arctic Circle in Scandinavia. Theres no easing his dad in on this trip for Barney. First up, they swing off the roof of Splits iconic football stadium, before diving headfirst into the crystal clear waters of the Adriatic Sea. The action continues when the pair go head to head on aqua bikes alongside a former world champion.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue
programme.desc: After Hurricane Helene obliterates a 100-year-old farmhouse in NC, a once self-sufficient family is left with nothing. The Raneys face their most urgent mission yet: to rebuild a fourth-generation homestead, making it 100% self-sustainable.

programme.title: Gold Rush
programme.desc: The boys are back in Alaska (although Discovery dropped the states mention in the title after the first season) hoping to strike it rich mining for gold. Their first effort was anything but rich and glorious, however, as the crew led by Todd Hoffman and his father, Jack, sunk $250,000 into their dream and came away with just $20,000 worth of gold. The dismal summer was filled with injuries, malfunctioning equipment and constant fighting among the greenhorn miners, yet their serious case of gold fever trumps any talk of giving up and leads to a new operating plan in order to salvage their dream. The series also keeps tabs on the efforts of teenager Parker Schnabel and old-timer Dakota Fred to hit the mother lode at separate sites.

programme.desc: Phil and Claire drop Haley off at college, and trouble brews at Lilys kindergarten.

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Luke wants to quit magic and Phil just cant seem to accept it. Meanwhile, one of Glorias new pregnancy symptoms is snoring and shes keeping the whole house awake, forcing Jay to take desperate measures.

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: After meeting his millionaire half-brother, Homer sets out to design the perfect car.

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Abe tells Marshall Goldman of the time he was on a World War II battleship and the story is later published in the Springfield Shopper. As a result, his Springfield popularity increases rapidly and he decides to `dump Homer as his son.

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.sub-title: Once Upon a Time in Springfield
programme.desc: Krustys show is losing its female ratings and his executives implement the hire of new female co-star, Princess Penelope. Meanwhile, Mr Burns takes away the free doughnuts from the nuclear power plant.

programme.title: First Dates
programme.desc: Relentless optimist Charlie has a heart-to-heart with emotional osteopath Benji. Single mum Rachel considers a date with divorced toilet paper salesman Stephen.

programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon is back in Woodland Park, Colorado, for the conclusion of his attempt to help struggling Italian restaurant Mangia Mangia avoid ruin. Will harassed owner Julie ever be reconciled with her out-of-control head chef?

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer and Grampa team up to create a new sport that rivals pickleball, until Homer kicks Grampa off.

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: When Bart and Lisa stop watching Itchy and Scratchy together, Marge fears that theyll start to drift apart.

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Claire flies solo to her college reunion and runs into a professor she once dated, but when Phil shows up things get really awkward.

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Claire and Cam clash while flipping the house, and Mitch diffuses a situation between Lily and a classmate via a game of handball.

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: After meeting his millionaire half-brother, Homer sets out to design the perfect car.

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Abe tells Marshall Goldman of the time he was on a World War II battleship and the story is later published in the Springfield Shopper. As a result, his Springfield popularity increases rapidly and he decides to `dump Homer as his son.

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.sub-title: Once Upon a Time in Springfield
programme.desc: Krustys show is losing its female ratings and his executives implement the hire of new female co-star, Princess Penelope. Meanwhile, Mr Burns takes away the free doughnuts from the nuclear power plant.

programme.title: First Dates
programme.desc: A retired champion car racer meets a champion ballroom dancer who, she says, seeks a man with balls. And model Rebecca, from Babestation, meets leather-clad Mak as sparks fly.

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Marge takes a job with Lionel Hutzs Red Blazer Realty, an estate agency, but begins to question her morals when she has to sell properties to her friends that arent quite up to scratch. Despite this, she still manages to convince the Flanders to move to the quaintly named Murder House.

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: When Bart destroys the familys Christmas trees and presents, his lies about a burglar stealing them spiral out of control, leaving the Simpsons heavily indebted to the generous townsfolk.

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: After Bart humiliates him at church, Homer finally teaches his son to admire his dad - until a visit from a magical, singing janitor changes everything.

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Marge is cast as Blanche DuBois in a local musical production of `A Streetcar Named Desire. The show stinks but Homers crass comments inspire Marge to give the performance of a lifetime.

programme.title: First Dates
programme.desc: Craig, a salesman who has fathered three children, each one with a different woman, is hoping to find someone accepting of his modern family. Gamer Olivia is on the hunt for a geeky James Bond. And ex-party boy Billy is looking for a companion.

programme.title: Celebs Go Dating
programme.desc: The celebs arrive in Tenerife, ready for their dates with their mixer picks. Gabby dates gym-owner Karl, while David heads out for dinner with fireman Tomasz.

programme.title: The Predator
programme.desc: From the outer reaches of space to the small-town streets of suburbia, the hunt comes home. The universes most lethal hunters are stronger, smarter and deadlier than ever before, having genetically upgraded themselves with DNA from other species. When a boy accidentally triggers their return to Earth, only a ragtag crew of ex-soldiers and an evolutionary biologist can prevent the end of the human race.

programme.title: Naked Attraction
programme.desc: Pansexual sex therapist Mariias after a not-so-average Mr or Mrs whos not too tired for sex. Old romantic at heart Alannah seeks a forever fella who can speak her love language.

programme.title: First Dates
programme.desc: Fred welcomes more single people looking for love to the new-look First Dates restaurant. First up, dapper 24-year-old gent Will is looking for his English rose to share his love of the countryside. He loves tweed, and so does his date, Fran.

programme.title: Celebs Go Dating
programme.desc: The celebs arrive in Tenerife, ready for their dates with their mixer picks. Gabby dates gym-owner Karl, while David heads out for dinner with fireman Tomasz.

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: A fun Valentines Day romp between Phil and Claires alter egos, Clive Bixby and Juliana, takes an unexpected turn that lands Claire in the hospital and with a diagnosis that she doesnt take lying down.

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Mitch and Cams friend Sal is back with a bombshell, and Phil steps in to help Luke woo a girl he likes.

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: With everyone preoccupied with the new baby on the way, Ericas graduation is met with lackluster enthusiasm from Beverly and Geoff; Adams new job is in jeopardy; Barry tries to be the new man of the house.

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: With her due date approaching, Erica is over pregnancy and demands a babymoon; Adam and Barry seek out advice on being an uncle from some unexpected sources.

programme.title: Dont Tell the Bride
programme.desc: Romantic groom Ash wants to pull off the Most Romantic Wedding ever, but his bride-to-be Vicki shuns anything corny. Hopefully, she will not be left feeling totally love `sick.

programme.title: LEGO Masters: Australia vs The World
programme.desc: The remaining teams build fighting robot brickbots and pit them against each other in the Brickbot Arena. Let the battle of the bricks begin!

programme.title: The Amazing Race Australia: Celebrity Edition
programme.desc: Our teams go back to school at an extraordinary floating classroom on Cambodias Tonle Sap Lake. But wholl come a cropper after a hard-graft harvesting task?

programme.title: Made in Chelsea
programme.desc: Tristans not a fan of Chuggs and Zeynos budding romance. Parenthood takes a toll on Alice and Sam. And after their fiery argument, can Jazz and Inga reconcile?

programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Chef Ramsey tackles spoiled food, fake fish and a small customer base when he visits Sante La Brea in the heart of Hollywood.

programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay tries to help a husband and wife in Chicago with their Cafe 36 restaurant, which is losing money due to a lack of clientele and a head chef who isnt concerned with quality.

programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon heads to Boston for the first of two visits to La Galleria 33, an Italian restaurant opened in 2006 by raucous sisters Rita and Lisa. The two siblings grew up working at their fathers successful restaurant nearby, but when they opened their own establishment, the customers didnt materialise. The sisters blame everything from the weather to the tablecloths for their failures.

programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon confronts restaurant owners and sisters Rita and Lisa with an ultimatum. His stand-off with the siblings is just the beginning of the explosive action. He finds himself stuck in a war between the waiters, chefs and owners over who is to blame for the restaurants failings. Can Gordon wrangle these hapless proprietors and stubborn employees back into one productive team and save the restaurant?

programme.title: Married at First Sight Australia
programme.desc: After eight weeks, its all getting very real with the final Commitment Ceremony, as the couples face the experts a last time before Final Vows.

programme.title: Married at First Sight Australia
programme.desc: In the ultimate heres what you couldve won, the participants meet their alternate matches. And it all proves... interesting.

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Bart finds his old teachers diary and learns a surprising secret; Lisa discovers an even bigger surprise.

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Cletus becomes a singing sensation; Homer becomes a new man; Cletus turns against his fans.

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.sub-title: Do Pizza Bots Dream of Electric Guitars
programme.desc: Homer tries to reunite his favourite band from his youth, but film and TV creator J.J. Abrams gets to them first.

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Mr Burns gets into the plant-based burger business, Lisa refuses to believe hes up to no good.

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.sub-title: Panic on the Streets of Springfield
programme.desc: Lisa gets an imaginary friend who makes her feel much better about her friends; Homer gets a vehicle with awesome torque.

programme.title: Mrs Doubtfire
programme.desc: Slapstick film about a divorced actor who is willing to go to any lengths to get his children back, even posing as a matronly Scottish housekeeper. His family, taken in by the disguise, decide to employ the eccentric but apparently capable widow, and everyone is happy with the arrangement - until the mothers old boyfriend reappears and tries to become a father figure to the children.

programme.title: Celebrity Gogglebox
programme.desc: Some of Britains best loved famous faces share their sharp, insightful, funny and emotional views on popular and topical TV shows. From Saturday night entertainment juggernauts to the weeks biggest news stories, celebs become opinionated viewers.

programme.desc: Britains sharpest armchair critics share more of their sharp, insightful, passionate and sometimes emotional critiques of the weeks biggest and best shows on television.

programme.title: Old Boys
programme.desc: During the production of "Cyrano" for a school play, an awkward but imaginative pupil helps the handsome but spectacularly dim school hero pursue the fiery daughter of a visiting French teacher.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Shopping from home.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Shopping from home.

programme.title: Twelve OClock High
programme.desc: "Were in a war, a shooting war. Weve got to fight, and some of us have got to die". Frank Savage is the WWII commander drawing every ounce of fight from his weary airmen.

programme.title: The Black Shield of Falworth
programme.desc: Myles Falworth, the son of a disgraced knight, is determined to prove himself. With the help of the Earl of Mackworth and despite the sneers of his contemporaries, he trains for his knighthood and finally earns his spurs and the nations thanks when he foils a plot to de-throne King Henry IV. His love interest is Lady Anne Mackworth, while the Earl of Alban is the requisite baddie that Falworth must overcome.

programme.title: The Undefeated
programme.desc: After the Civil War, a Union colonel leading a herd of 3,000 horses into Mexico with his adopted Indian son runs into an exodus of Confederates heading the same way, but conflict between the rival factions is averted when they find a common enemy; Mexican bandits intent on stealing the horses, and killing all the Americans they can find.

programme.title: Midnight Run
programme.desc: A gruff cop turned bounty hunter captures a fugitive accountant accused of fraud and sets off from New York for Los Angeles to collect his prize. However, he is unaware that both the Mafia and the FBI are also on the accountants trail and hot on their heels.

programme.title: Warlock
programme.desc: A 17th-century Satanist and the witch hunter who snared him are propelled 300 years into the future.

programme.title: Submarine
programme.desc: Oliver Tate, fifteen-years-old, has two goals he wants to achieve: to extinguish the flame between his mother and an ex-lover who has resurfaced in her life and to lose his virginity before he turns sixteen.
