programme.desc: The five original members of the Beach Boys perform hits including "Good Vibrations," "Surfin USA" and "Its OK." Brian returned for the show, filmed live at Anaheim Stadium in 1976.

programme.title: Beach Boys: Endless Harmony
programme.desc: Documentary about the pioneering surf and harmony band featuring interviews with the surviving Boys, archive footage and a soundtrack full of hits.

programme.title: Isle of Wight Festival 2024 (Highlights)
programme.desc: Highlights from Saturday at Isle of Wight Festival 2024, with incredible live performances from The Prodigy, The Streets, and more kicking off the weekend at Seaclose Park.

programme.title: Rampage
programme.desc: Primatologist Davis Okoye shares an unshakable bond with George, an extraordinarily intelligent silverback gorilla thats been in his care since birth. When a genetic experiment goes wrong, it causes George, a wolf and a reptile to grow to a monstrous size. As the mutated beasts embark on a path of destruction, Okoye teams up with a discredited genetic engineer and the military to secure an antidote and prevent a global catastrophe.

programme.title: The Cinema List: Fast Cars
programme.desc: Gear up for upcoming blockbuster Fast X and buckle in for a countdown of the best cars from each of the Fast and Furious films, from Brians Toyota Supra to Doms Dodge Charger.

programme.title: The Brothers Grimm
programme.desc: Nineteenth-century con artists, Jake and Will Grimm, are caught up in a fairy-tale nightmare. They travel from village to village, pretending to protect the people from enchanted creatures and carrying out exorcisms. These skills are put to the test when they come across a genuine magical curse in a haunted forest.

programme.title: Jackie Chans First Strike
programme.desc: A Hong Kong detective is contracted to recover a stolen nuclear warhead. Hired by both the CIA and Russian intelligence, the kung-fu cop is harassed, assaulted and framed for murder as he delves into the murky world of international arms dealing.

programme.title: Justice League
programme.desc: Fuelled by his restored faith in humanity, and inspired by Supermans selfless act, Bruce Wayne enlists newfound ally Diana Prince to face an even greater threat. Together, Batman and Wonder Woman work quickly to recruit a team to stand against this newly-awakened enemy. Despite the formation of an unprecedented league of heroes in Batman, Wonder Woman, Aquaman, Cyborg and the Flash, it may be too late to save the planet from an assault of catastrophic proportions.

programme.title: Kong: Skull Island
programme.desc: Scientists, soldiers and adventurers encounter the mighty Kong and other monstrous creatures after travelling to an uncharted island in the Pacific Ocean.

programme.title: xXx: The Return of Xander Cage
programme.desc: After coming out of self-imposed exile, daredevil operative Xander Cage must race against time to recover a sinister weapon known as Pandoras Box, a device that controls every military satellite in the world. Recruiting a new group of thrill-seeking cohorts, Xander finds himself entangled in a deadly conspiracy that points to collusion at the highest levels of government.

programme.title: Gladiator II
programme.desc: Lucius must enter the Colosseum after the powerful emperors of Rome conquer his home. With rage in his heart and the future of the empire at stake, he looks to the past to find the strength and honour needed to return the glory of Rome to its people.

programme.title: Uncharted
programme.desc: Treasure hunter Victor Sullivan recruits Nathan Drake to help him recover a 500-year-old fortune. What starts out as a heist becomes a globe-trotting, white-knuckle race to reach the prize before the ruthless Santiago Moncada can get his hands on it.

programme.title: Spider-Man
programme.desc: Adaptation of the adventures of the swinging comic-strip hero. A shy student becomes a crime fighter after a bite from a mutant spider, during a school outing, gives him extraordinary powers. As he comes to terms with his new-found abilities, he is also forced to contend with a maniac villain known as the Green Goblin.

programme.title: The Long Kiss Goodnight
programme.desc: An amnesiac schoolteacher discovers she was formerly a government assassin when she hires a low-rent private eye to help fill the gaps in her memory. Together, they go on the run in a race against the clock to stop her former taskmasters from putting a heinous plan into action, before they can silence her for good.

programme.title: The Brothers Grimm
programme.desc: Nineteenth-century con artists, Jake and Will Grimm, are caught up in a fairy-tale nightmare. They travel from village to village, pretending to protect the people from enchanted creatures and carrying out exorcisms. These skills are put to the test when they come across a genuine magical curse in a haunted forest.

programme.title: Jackie Chans First Strike
programme.desc: A Hong Kong detective is contracted to recover a stolen nuclear warhead. Hired by both the CIA and Russian intelligence, the kung-fu cop is harassed, assaulted and framed for murder as he delves into the murky world of international arms dealing.

programme.title: Bloodshot
programme.desc: After he and his wife are murdered, marine Ray Garrison is resurrected by a team of scientists. Enhanced with nanotechnology, he becomes a superhuman, biotech killing machine - Bloodshot. As Ray first trains with fellow super-soldiers, he cannot recall anything from his former life. But when his memories flood back and he remembers the man that killed both him and his wife, he breaks out of the facility to get revenge, only to discover that theres more to the conspiracy than he thought.

programme.title: Just Go With It
programme.desc: His heart recently broken, plastic surgeon Danny Maccabee (Adam Sandler) pretends to be married so he can enjoy future dates with no strings attached. His web of lies works, but when he meets Palmer (Brooklyn Decker) -- the gal of his dreams -- she resists involvement. Instead of coming clean, Danny enlists Katherine (Jennifer Aniston), his assistant, to pose as his soon-to-be-ex-wife. Instead of solving Dannys problems, the lies create more trouble.

programme.title: Friendship
programme.desc: A man tries to befriend his charismatic new neighbour, but it soon threatens to ruin both of their lives.

programme.title: Kindergarten Cop
programme.desc: Comic tale in which a tough cop is forced to go undercover as a kindergarten teacher. In his new role, he must track down a mother and son who are the only witnesses against a drug-dealing criminal, who is also their husband and father. The cop uses his brutal methods to negotiate the mundane problems of child control.

programme.title: Coyotes
programme.desc: Members of a family find themselves in a desperate fight for survival when a pack of coyotes swarms their Hollywood Hills home.

programme.title: The Sweetest Thing
programme.desc: When Christina and Courtney take their romantically disillusioned roommate Jane on a night out, Christina meets Peter and falls hopelessly in love with him. However, having missed her chance with Peter on that particular evening, the trio embark on a hilarious road trip in search of Mr Right.

programme.title: Napoleon Dynamite
programme.desc: Geeky high schooler Napoleon fancies quiet Deb but cant ask her to the prom. His brother Kip has an online relationship and dreams of being a cage fighter, while his uncle Rico is more interested in his mail-order time-travel machine. Napoleons mission is to help his friend Pedro win the student presidency from the nasty Summer.

programme.title: Bridget Jones: Mad About the Boy
programme.desc: After jumping back into the dating pool, single mother Bridget Jones finds herself caught between a younger man and her sons science teacher.

programme.title: Blazing Saddles
programme.desc: Irreverent spoof about a black sheriff hired by a crooked speculator to drive citizens out of an all-white town which lies in the path of a railroad. The townspeople turn on the inexperienced sheriff, and he is forced to turn to a convict, once the fastest gun in the West, for help.

programme.title: Arthur
programme.desc: An alcoholic millionaire is threatened with losing his inheritance if he does not marry the girl of his parents choosing. Despite his dislike for his prospective bride, he bows to the inevitable only to meet a light-fingered waitress who steals his heart. John Gielgud won an Oscar for his role as Arthurs loyal but outspoken valet.

programme.title: Yesterday
programme.desc: Jack Malik is a struggling singer-songwriter in an English seaside town whose dreams of fame are rapidly fading, despite the fierce devotion and support of his childhood best friend, Ellie. After a freak bus accident during a mysterious global blackout, Jack wakes up to discover that The Beatles have never existed. Performing songs by the greatest band in history to a world that has never heard them, Jack becomes on overnight sensation with a little help from his agent.

programme.title: Am I OK?
programme.desc: When Lucy realises that shes never been attracted to men, her lifelong friend Jane helps her navigate coming out in her 30s.

programme.title: Mean Machine
programme.desc: A footballer is jailed for throwing a crucial game. Whilst inside, the football-loving warden sets him the task of coaching a team of prisoners to take on the all-conquering warders side. Can he form a disparate bunch of prisoners into a winning team?

programme.title: Sausage Party
programme.desc: Supermarket perishables devise a plan to escape from their human enemies after Frank the sausage learns that they will eventually become meals.

programme.title: Role Models
programme.desc: Danny is sour after driving away his girlfriend, and Wheeler is into anything wearing a skirt. The two get into a fight with a trucker and choose community service over a jail term.

programme.title: Role Models
programme.desc: Danny is sour after driving away his girlfriend, and Wheeler is into anything wearing a skirt. The two get into a fight with a trucker and choose community service over a jail term.

programme.title: A Mistake
programme.desc: A surgeon allows her young colleague to take charge during a surgery. When a mistake occurs, the surgeon finds herself in a difficult situation.

programme.title: Babylon
programme.desc: The story of Blue, a young man of Jamaican descent living in Brixton in 1980, as he hangs out with his friends, fronts a dub sound system, loses his job, struggles with family problems and has his friendships tested by racism.

programme.title: Beach Rats
programme.desc: An aimless teen in Brooklyn, NY, spends the summer with his delinquent buddies, a potential new girlfriend and older men that he meets online.

programme.title: The United States vs. Billie Holiday
programme.desc: The Federal Bureau of Narcotics launches an undercover sting operation against jazz singer Billie Holiday.

programme.title: Chuck Chuck Baby
programme.desc: Helen lives with her ex-husband, his 20-year-old girlfriend, their new baby and his dying mother. Her dreary life is interrupted when her schoolgirl crush arrives back in town.

programme.title: A Different Man
programme.desc: An aspiring actor undergoes a radical medical procedure to drastically transform his appearance. However, his new dream face quickly turns into a nightmare as he becomes obsessed with reclaiming what was lost.

programme.title: About Time
programme.desc: After discovering that he can travel through time, a young man uses his ability to win the woman of his dreams and save his friend from professional disaster.

programme.title: Downton Abbey: The Grand Finale (Signed)
programme.desc: In 1930, the Crawleys grapple with the threat of social disgrace when Mary finds herself at the centre of a public scandal. (2025, 123 mins)

programme.title: The Illusionist
programme.desc: In 1900s Vienna, mesmeric entertainer Eisenheims magical abilities are wowing the crowds, with an act that ranges from mere tricks to an apparent capacity to raise the dead. However, he has also long been in love with Duchess Sophie von Teschen, which puts him in dangerous competition with the violent, scheming Crown Prince Leopold, who jumps at the opportunity to have the magician arrested grounds of necromancy.

programme.title: Rocketman
programme.desc: Set to his most beloved songs, its the epic musical story of Elton John, his breakthrough years in the 1970s and his fantastical transformation from shy piano prodigy to international superstar and pop icon.

programme.title: Anora
programme.desc: Anora, a sex worker from Brooklyn, gets her chance at a Cinderella story when she meets and marries the son of an oligarch. Once the news reaches Russia, her fairytale is threatened as the parents set out for New York to get the marriage annulled.

programme.title: Beach Rats
programme.desc: An aimless teen in Brooklyn, NY, spends the summer with his delinquent buddies, a potential new girlfriend and older men that he meets online.

programme.title: Widow Clicquot
programme.desc: The story behind the Veuve Clicquot champagne family and business that began in the late 18th century.

programme.title: The Cut
programme.desc: Given one last shot at glory, a former boxing champion has just six days to make weight for a title fight. His obsession soon leaves him at the mercy of a notorious trainer who takes every last ounce from his mind, body and soul.

programme.title: The Cut

Covering several decades, the action ranges from majestic Montana to the battlefields of Europe and adventure on the high seas.

programme.desc: The ocean sprawls across 70 percent of the planet and is home to as many as one million known species of plants and animals. However, it is the smallest of ocean creatures that underpins the worlds largest food web, plankton. These microscopic organisms drift through the oceans diverse habitats, triggering feeding cycles in their wake. Without them, life in the ocean would cease to exist.

programme.title: David Attenboroughs First Life
programme.desc: Sir David Attenborough journeys across the globe to discover how the earliest animals developed on our planet. Attenborough meets expert fossil hunters, and sees on-site some of the most remarkable finds that have transformed our understanding of the first animal life forms, including the first set of eyes and teeth and the first predators and parasites.

programme.title: David Attenboroughs First Life

programme.title: David Attenboroughs Wild City
programme.desc: Sir David Attenborough uncovers the unseen natural treasures of Singapore and explores how the wildlife has adapted to the human world.

programme.title: David Attenboroughs Wild City
programme.desc: With the latest film-making technology, Sir David Attenborough uncovers the unseen natural treasures of Singapore and explores how the wildlife has adapted to the human world.

programme.title: David Attenboroughs Dragons And Damsels
programme.desc: They are beautiful, their behaviours are as complex as mammals and they have existed since the dinosaurs. Join David Attenborough as he delves into the life of dragonflies and damselflies.

programme.title: Great Barrier Reef with David Attenborough
programme.desc: David descends beneath the waves at night in the state of the art Triton submersible, the first of its kind to visit the reef. He meets some of the tiny coral animals that built the reef and helped to turn it into an underwater wonderland.

programme.title: Great Barrier Reef with David Attenborough
programme.desc: David continues his exploration of the Great Barrier Reef, aboard the research vessel the Alucia. He discovers the incredible animals that visit the reef every year, from birds to whales, some travelling thousands of kilometres to get there.

programme.title: Great Barrier Reef with David Attenborough
programme.desc: David examines what the next few decades hold for this remarkable community of animals, as well as what is being done to save it.

programme.title: A David Attenborough Special
programme.desc: On his 89th birthday, David Attenborough talks about his career, his recent record-breaking dive on the Great Barrier Reef and issues facing the natural world today.

programme.title: Micro Monsters With David Attenborough
programme.desc: Right beneath our feet is a secret world of disguise and espionage, social networking and courtship, rape and pillage, parenthood and relationships. Sir David Attenborough investigates how macroscopic residents outwit their enemies to survive.

programme.title: Micro Monsters With David Attenborough
programme.desc: Its a bug-eating world out there, and the documentary continues with a look at how the various critters disable the defences of their respective prey.

programme.title: Micro Monsters With David Attenborough
programme.desc: Dating is just as tricky a business in the insect world, and Sir David Attenborough finds out how certain bugs choose and then woo their partners.

programme.title: Micro Monsters With David Attenborough
programme.desc: Sir David Attenborough reveals how different bugs usher in the next generation, including the butterfly and harvestman spider.

programme.title: Micro Monsters With David Attenborough
programme.desc: Join Sir David Attenborough as he zooms in on a set of bugs who prefer co-operation to conflict. Features the likes of the burrowing cockroach and the queen bee.

programme.title: Micro Monsters With David Attenborough
programme.desc: Sir David Attenborough takes a tour of the insect worlds vast colonies, which rival human megacities in terms of size and complexity.

programme.title: Kingdom of Plants
programme.desc: David begins his journey inside the magnificent Palm House, a unique global rainforest in London.

programme.title: Kingdom of Plants
programme.desc: David Attenborough explores the secret life of plants at Kew, examining everything from a huge underground specimen to a snappy carnivorous variety.

programme.title: Kingdom of Plants
programme.desc: David Attenborough concludes his absorbing journey around Londons Kew Gardens, as he discovers how some plants have evolved to shed their dependency on water enabling them to survive in the driest environments.

programme.title: Flying Monsters with David Attenborough
programme.desc: David Attenborough embarks on a journey into the past to explore the ancient world of the pterosaur, a remarkable flying monster that ruled the skies 200 million years ago.

programme.title: Making David Attenboroughs Flying Monsters
programme.desc: An eye-opening documentary that whets appetites for the pioneering 3D TV event. Join Sir David Attenborough as he sets out to unlock evolutionary secrets.

programme.title: David Attenboroughs Rise of Animals: Triumph of the Vertebrates
programme.sub-title: From the Seas to the Skies
programme.desc: David Attenborough uses fossil evidence and CGI to reveal the story of the vertebrates, from their humble origins as the primitive fish that once swam in ancient seas, to their radical move onto land and beyond.

programme.title: David Attenboroughs Rise of Animals: Triumph of the Vertebrates
programme.desc: David Attenborough uses fossil evidence and CGI to reveal how mammals developed from tiny forest dwellers to become the dominant life form on the planet.

programme.title: David Attenboroughs Global Adventure
programme.desc: In his mid-eighties, David Attenborough embarked on a seven-year journey. From the depths of the Great Barrier Reef to the ancient rainforests of Borneo, following his adventure across the globe.

programme.title: David Attenboroughs Global Adventure: Home Planet
programme.desc: In his eighties, David Attenborough embarked on a seven-year journey. From the stunning Great Barrier Reef to the rainforests of Borneo, follow his voyage across the globe.

programme.title: David Attenboroughs Global Adventure: The Rise of Nature
programme.desc: David Attenborough explores the rise of life on our planet, from the explosion of first life on seabeds hundreds of millions of years ago to life today.

programme.title: David Attenboroughs Dragons And Damsels
programme.desc: They are beautiful, their behaviours are as complex as mammals and they have existed since the dinosaurs. Join David Attenborough as he delves into the life of dragonflies and damselflies.

programme.desc: Tamara is looking for a gown that makes a statement. Meanwhile, Stephanie comes in for her fitting still not convinced that shes bought the right dress.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress
programme.desc: Marked-down designer dresses at bargain prices.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Shopping from home.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Shopping from home.

programme.title: Young Sheldon
programme.sub-title: An 8-Bit Princess and a Flat Tire Genius
programme.desc: Meemaw gives Sheldon his first video game, while George Sr gets jealous when Georgie bonds with Herschel from the garage.

programme.title: Young Sheldon
programme.sub-title: Family Dynamics and a Red Fiero
programme.desc: Sheldon must study the dynamics of his family for his school psychology project. George Sr is offered a new job in Oklahoma.

programme.title: Young Sheldon
programme.sub-title: A Stunted Childhood and a Can of Fancy Mixed Nuts
programme.desc: When Sheldon learns that people with stunted childhoods can turn into social outcasts, he tries to act like a kid. Meemaw and Dr. Sturgis relationship is tested when she teaches him how to drive.

programme.title: Young Sheldon
programme.sub-title: A Race of Superhumans and a Letter to Alf
programme.desc: Sheldon agrees to help Missy with her maths homework. Georgie joins a bible study group to get closer to Veronica.

programme.title: Young Sheldon
programme.sub-title: A Tummy Ache and a Whale of a Metaphor
programme.desc: A Tummy Ache and a Whale of a Metaphor: Sheldon spends some days in hospital, but he is the worlds worst patient and his behaviour takes a toll on everyone.

programme.title: Young Sheldon
programme.sub-title: A Nuclear Reactor and a Boy Called Lovey
programme.desc: Sheldon attempts to build a nuclear reactor. Georgie is heartbroken when he learns that Veronica has a boyfriend.

programme.title: Georgie and Mandys First Marriage
programme.sub-title: Bitin, Spankin and a Load of Yankee Psychobabble
programme.desc: Georgie and Mandy get upset when Audrey disciplines CeeCee without their permission.

programme.title: Georgie and Mandys First Marriage
programme.desc: Georgies feud with a rival store threatens his partnership with Ruben; Mandy finds out Georgies been keeping secrets from her.

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Leonard confronts the man who bullied him in high school, while Penny realises she did her fair share of tormenting in the past.

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: When Sheldon proves dismissive of Amys career accomplishments, Penny, Raj and Leonard try to make him realise that sometimes its beneficial to a relationship to pretend to care about things, even if you arent really that interested. Meanwhile, Howard notices that Bernadette cant stand being around children when the two of them perform a magic show at his nephews birthday party.

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: In the 100th episode of the popular US sitcom, Leonard decides to ask Penny out on a date, and they both agree to give their relationship another chance. They argue over dinner and remember why things didnt work out between them in the first place, but end up sleeping together anyway. Later they agree to continue seeing each other secretly, on the condition that they act like friends when everyone else is around.

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Leonard and Penny decide to put their relationship through a `beta test, allowing them to report the problems they have with each other as `bugs.

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: After Sheldon keeps Leonard awake all night, Leonard decides that he needs a break from Sheldons thankless demands and the roommate agreement is formally broken, ending the friendship between them.

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon is forced to use up his two weeks of holiday time from work, so he goes to help Amy in her biology lab during his fortnight off.

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: When Sheldon and Kripke argue over who should get Professor Rothmans vacant corner office, Leonard, Raj and Howard devise a contest to settle the issue with the office as the winning prize.

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldons well-organised world is turned upside down when he learns that the barber who has cut his hair for years has passed away. As his orderly routines descend into chaos, he is forced to act like a hippy in order to match his shaggy new hairstyle. Meanwhile, Howard is sent to Houston for the gruelling NASA training programme and shares horrific stories about his experiences with Bernadette via Skype.

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Amy gets upset with Sheldon when he breaks his promise to accompany her to her aunts birthday party and instead opts to join the guys for a `Star Wars video game marathon lasting the entire weekend. Later, Penny convinces Amy that she should confront Sheldon about the matter and demand an apology.

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Desperate to find a `plus one to take to a wedding, Raj finally gives up and asks his parents to set him up with a date. Meanwhile, Penny buys Leonard and Sheldon some `Star Trek memorabilia, but she is irked when they refuse to play with the toys in case their value is diminished by removing them from the packaging.

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: When Stephen Hawking comes to lecture at the university for a week, Wolowitz is given the task of maintaining his wheelchair, making Sheldon green with envy. When Sheldon begs Wolowitz to introduce him to his hero Hawking, Wolowitz takes full advantage and only agrees after making Sheldon carry out a series of humiliating tasks, including doing his laundry, cleaning his room, and taking his mother dress shopping.

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Leonard, Sheldon and Koothrappali throw a classy bachelor party for Wolowitz, during which some stories about the future bridegrooms colourful sexual history are accidentally revealed. When Bernadette hears about it, she becomes upset and threatens to call off the wedding. Can Wolowitz win her over with a convincing explanation and a heartfelt apology to get the nuptials back on track?

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: When NASA tells a nervous Wolowitz that his space mission has been rescheduled, he tries to use the wedding as an excuse not to go, but hes forced to agree when he realises that Bernadettes father only likes him because hes an astronaut. Amy develops a cunning psychological plan to bring Sheldon closer, and Penny is surprised by a proposal at an inappropriate moment.

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: In the last episode of season five, Bernadette decides that she wants to be married to Wolowitz before his NASA space mission takes place. They scramble to organise a wedding ceremony at City Hall in the short time available, but their plans go awry. Can their friends step in to find an ordained minister and a romantic wedding venue before its too late?

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Howard gets caught in an argument between his mum and Bernadette while at the International Space Station. Meanwhile, Ray is feeling lonely so Sheldon invites him along to his second anniversary date with Amy.

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon intervenes when he learns that Penny is thinking about breaking up with Leonard, but he is hampered by his inability to keep a secret. Meanwhile, in space, Howard is being picked on by the other astronauts.

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Amy is jealous when Sheldon hires an attractive female assistant named Alex. However, it turns out that Alex is more interested in Leonard, which makes Penny feel threatened. Meanwhile, Howard discovers that his return from space has been delayed by a week and the pressure begins to take its toll on his mind.

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Wolowitz is disappointed when he doesnt receive a heros welcome on his return from space. Bernadette is out of action with a heavy cold, his mother is occupied with her dentist, Koothrappali has a new best friend, and Sheldon, Amy, Leonard and Penny are deeply involved in an ultra-competitive games night. Will Wolowitz ever get the recognition he deserves as an astronaut?

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: The gang celebrates Halloween with a fancy dress party at Stuarts comic book shop, but Sheldon and Amy cant agree about which costumes to wear. Leonard and Penny get a new spark in their relationship when she visits him at his laboratory. Howard just cant stop talking about his trip to space, much to the irritation of his friends, and it takes a word from astronaut Buzz Aldrin to get his feet back on the ground.

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon gets excited when Stephen Hawking agrees to play against him in an online game of `Words with Friends. However, when Sheldon starts to dominate the game, Hawking is less than pleased. Elsewhere, Penny signs up for a class at community college but feels reluctant to tell Leonard about it.

programme.title: Inside the Kim Kardashian Heist
programme.desc: Paris 2016: Kim Kardashian is robbed of $6 million of jewellery. For Kim and the Hotels concierge, who are both held at gunpoint, it is a horrific life-changing ordeal. For the elite anti-bandit brigade, its the citys reputation that is at stake.

programme.title: Inside the Kim Kardashian Heist
programme.desc: CCTV, wiretaps and the DNA left at the scene of the Kim Kardashian diamond heist soon have the cops closing in on a surprising gang of suspects.

programme.title: Inside the Kim Kardashian Heist
programme.desc: Nine years after the heist, the concierge fights to have his victim status recognised, but he must confront the Grandpa Gang in court - a gang so remorseless that one of their members made a successful book out of the crime.

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper
programme.desc: John fears the large lump on his neck could become so big that it may eventually suffocate him. Shoshana is depressed because of the big growth on her forehead. Ashley hopes Dr. Lee can provide some relief from her three painful skin conditions.

programme.title: Young Sheldon

programme.desc: 24-year-old Ashleys only source of comfort is food and fake friendships. Soon, she learns she cant lie to Dr Now like she does with everyone else.

programme.desc: Despite having the largest pre-war European army, Frances outdated forces were humiliated by the Germans. programme.title: The Americas with Simon Reeve
programme.desc: Simon Reeve continues his journey through the Americas. In this third leg of the journey Simon travels down the length of California. In northern California he explores the land of the giant redwoods, where he learns that only a fraction of old growth forest survives.

programme.title: The Americas with Simon Reeve
programme.desc: Simon travels from Texas and down the length of Mexico. In Texas, Simon joins the US Border Patrol, who constantly pick up migrants who have illegally crossed the dangerous Rio Grande river in search of a new life in the United States. In the midst of this humanitarian crisis, Simon meets one woman who risks her life to take vital supplies across the border to stranded migrants.

programme.title: Greece with Simon Reeve
programme.desc: Simon Reeve travels from the islands of the Aegean to Greeces capital, Athens. To learn more about Greece and the Greeks, he meets an extraordinary cast of characters, from gun-toting priests to the last remaining sponge divers. Getting behind the postcard image of this beautiful country, he finds out how the Greeks are coming to terms with a seemingly endless crisis.

programme.title: Bangers and Cash
programme.desc: New. An impressive collection of five iconic cars arrives at Thornton le Dale, including a 1967 Crayford Corsair and a 1966 Ford Zodiac which emerge from a garage in Selby.

programme.title: Bangers and Cash
programme.desc: Nothing screams 1970s more than a Mk3 Ford Cortina 2000E. Derek Mathewson heads to Brigg to value a 1974 example with classic Coke bottle styling and a sweet Pinto engine.

programme.title: Bangers and Cash: Under the Bonnet
programme.desc: The story behind the rarest of achievements in motoring history: a Bangers profit. The team reconstruct a British icon that featured in `James Bond and headlined in `Pretty Woman.

programme.title: Bangers and Cash
programme.desc: Derek heads to Suffolk to collect two Bentleys with a majestic pedigree, with their own names: Cynthia a stunning 1963 S3 and Harry, a 1965 Continental.

programme.title: Bangers and Cash
programme.desc: Dave heads to West Yorkshire to collect a rare 1926 Dodge bus. Derek gets his hands on a rare Vauxhall Victor VX 90 police car that is expected to sell for more than a few coppers.

programme.title: Bangers and Cash
programme.desc: Dave heads to Bolton to pick up a classic Italian sports car - a Lancia Fulvia 1.3 Sport. This classic car was styled by the well known Milanese coach builder, Zagato. Zagato are famous for collaborating with high end car brands.

programme.title: Bangers and Cash
programme.desc: Derek rubs shoulders with pop music royalty when he picks up a classic Morgan sports car. A World War Two ambulance arrives at Thornton le Dale and a Ford Model T needs a new home.

programme.title: Bangers and Cash
programme.desc: This week at the Mathewsons, there is a 1982 Audi Quattro and a Sunbeam Alpine. Plus, Derek takes delivery of a beautiful green Renault van, previously used as a bread van in Paris.

programme.title: Bangers and Cash
programme.desc: Derek heads to Scotland in the mother of all rainstorms to pick up a Jaguar E-type and a rare MGC convertible. Plus, Dave extracts a rare Austin Gipsey from a lock up.

programme.title: Bangers and Cash
programme.desc: Theres a surprise waiting for Derek in Hull - a MGSA sports car that once had a tree growing through it. Plus, in North Wales, Alan Holmes is selling his sons Ford Escort RS 1600i.

programme.title: DIY SOS: The Big Build
programme.desc: In April 2012, Mark Burrows suffered brain damage in an unprovoked attack. Nick and the boys take on the task of building a self contained apartment alongside his parents bungalow so that Mark can at last come home.

programme.title: DIY SOS: The Big Build
programme.desc: Nick and the team head to Hull, to help Motor Neurone Disease and Fabrys disease sufferer Jason and his wife Liz build a home for themselves and their daughters.

programme.title: DIY SOS: The Big Build
programme.desc: Identical twins Katie and Emelia were born with achondroplasia, a form of dwarfism. Their family is struggling for space and in desperate need of some good luck. Thankfully, the DIY SOS team are on hand to help build them a home for a better future.

programme.title: The Supervet
programme.desc: A Bengal cat has a broken back and dislocated spine after being hit by a car. A German Shepherd needs a new elbow, and a Rottweiler puppy gets a stem cell fix for an ankle problem.

programme.title: The Supervet
programme.desc: Professor Noel Fitzpatrick helps a Humboldt penguin with an unhappy foot. Theres also a three-legged cat and a husky from Thailand needing hip surgery.

programme.title: DIY SOS: The Big Build
programme.desc: In April 2012, Mark Burrows suffered brain damage in an unprovoked attack. Nick and the boys take on the task of building a self contained apartment alongside his parents bungalow so that Mark can at last come home.

programme.title: DIY SOS: The Big Build
programme.desc: Nick and the team head to Hull, to help Motor Neurone Disease and Fabrys disease sufferer Jason and his wife Liz build a home for themselves and their daughters.

programme.title: Pete Wicks: For Dogs Sake
programme.sub-title: Terri, Esme and the Chi Family
programme.desc: Pete meets the four-legged friends that call the UKs leading dog welfare charity, Dogs Trust, home. From when they are rescued, Pete plays an instrumental role in their rehabilitation process, right up until the point the dogs are safely rehomed.

programme.title: Pete Wicks: For Dogs Sake
programme.sub-title: Hugo and The Ice Cream Pups
programme.desc: Pete meets some newborn pups fighting to survive, and helps teach Hugo, a Cane Corso rescued from quarantine at Dover, how to be a dog.

programme.title: Pete Wicks: For Dogs Sake
programme.desc: Pete helps a withdrawn pregnant Malinois regain strength so she can care for her 11 lively pups, and falls for Winter, a Staffie who is covered in scars.

programme.title: Gavin and Stacey
programme.desc: Gavin is uncomfortable with Gwen and Bryn knowing the ins and outs of his and Staceys sex life, and Smithy goes beyond the call of friendship by making a staggering suggestion. Meanwhile, Pete and Dawn prepare to renew their wedding vows, and everyone heads to Billericay to help them celebrate. But how will Dave react to the bombshell revelation about the curry night in Essex?

programme.title: Gavin and Stacey
programme.desc: It is Bank Holiday Monday, and the Essex contingent arrives for a sunny day out at the beach; even Doris gets her sun dress on. Gavins heart-to-heart with his dad gives him something more to think about, and a dark cloud looms on the horizon when Dave arrives to find Nessa and Smithy enjoying all the fun of the fair.

programme.title: Gavin and Stacey
programme.desc: Nessa and Daves wedding is fast approaching, and the preparations are in full swing. Stacey breaks some life-changing news to Gavin, while Bryn and Jason finally put their big secret to bed. Smithy takes care of Neil the baby, and wishes Nessa all the best as she makes her way to the church to marry Dave.

programme.title: Sort Your Life Out
programme.desc: Stacey and her team help the Bradshaw family part with 30 years of clutter in just seven days. Its the biggest challenge the team have faced so far, but it could help the Bradshaws fall back in love with their stunningly beautiful home. Retired electrician Wayne is a car boot sale enthusiast, and daughter Harriet worries that all the clutter is too much for her parents. Craft-loving Sue emotionally reveals that her son Alex is too embarrassed to bring people home.

programme.title: DIY SOS: The Big Build Ireland
programme.desc: Baz Ashmawy and his team set out to renovate the homes of deserving families, changing their lives forever, but with only nine days to transform each home, and dependent on the generosity of volunteers, the pressure is truly on.
